text:
Owner-curated Empty Space calendar resource
The supplied directory recommends The Empty Space's public schedule for Austin rope-community events: https://www.atxempty.space/space-schedule. The live page is titled Schedule and identifies The Empty Space as a Shibari Study Studio Partner.
The official About page describes The Empty Space as a queer, POC-owned and operated community space for gathering, learning, experience, and growth, with a foundation of respect, awareness, agency, and radical self-expression.
title: Owner-curated Empty Space calendar resource
